name: Eight Spiced Crispy Skinned Snapper in a Thai Hot And
recipeIngredient: 4 Snapper fillets with the scaled skin on
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt the snapper and coat only the meat side with the spice mix.
2. In a medium hot pan with canola oil, sauté the meat side first until brown.
3. Flip the snapper and roast in a 450 degree oven for 58 minutes.
4. Be careful not to burn the skin. You may have to flip it over to finish cooking.
5. Pull the crispy skin off and slice on the bias.
